summary: The diff updates WhatsApp message formatting in `frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts` to a Marathi template that greets the customer, injects the customer name, and formats the outstanding balance as INR. However, the diff does not show any UI/action wiring changes to ensure the WhatsApp message edit dialog is pre-filled from this new template or that edited text is used to generate the deep link.

missing_requirements.requirement: When a user selects "Send outstanding via WhatsApp" for an eligible customer, the WhatsApp message edit dialog opens with the message pre-filled using the new template (customer name + INR-formatted outstanding balance), and the user can edit it with the edited text used to generate the WhatsApp deep link.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows utility changes in `frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts` and does not include any changes in the action handler / dialog-opening code (e.g., CustomerTable or dialog components) that would set the dialog’s initial message value from the new formatter and then use the edited message to generate the link.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/updated WhatsApp eligibility validation with specific error messages (mobile required, invalid format, no outstanding balance).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 only requests updating the default WhatsApp reminder message template; it does not request introducing or changing eligibility validation behavior or error messages.

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented/changed phone number normalization logic (strip non-digits except '+', enforce >=10 digits).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 does not mention modifying phone normalization/validation logic; only the message template content/placeholder replacement is requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Implemented/changed WhatsApp deep link generation to use `https://wa.me/<number>?text=<encoded>`.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 focuses on the message template and prefill/edit behavior; it does not request changing the URL format used for WhatsApp deep links.
